audit_items.proof_trace: assetOutAmount (L442) and assetOut (L446) are local stack variables computed and cached before the callback invocation (L449); the callback receives assetOutAmount as a value parameter and cannot write back to the caller's stack. The reentrancy guard (s_entered=true at L418, checked in both bid and isValidSignature) blocks all re-entry paths. The transferFrom at L453 is bound to these pre-committed locals, so no callback-driven state manipulation can reduce the payment amount.
